name: 28_Stock_Price_Prediction_LSTM_YahooFinance_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kujenga mfumo wa utabiri wa bei za hisa kwa kutumia mfano wa LSTM na seti ya data ya Yahoo Finance? Tafadhali safisha data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje, na tumia dirisha la muda kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza kwa usimamizi. Mfano wa LSTM unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`, na upakiaji wa seti ya data, usafishaji, na ubadilishaji unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Hifadhi matokeo ya utabiri katika `results/predictions.txt` na tengeneza na hifadhi chati za mwingiliano za matokeo ya utabiri katika `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html` kwa kutumia Plotly. Unda Jupyter Notebook yenye taswira ya usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na matokeo ya utabiri na ihifadhi kama ripoti ya PDF katika `results/report.pdf`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usafishaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Dirisha la muda linatumika kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza kwa usimamizi. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Chati za mwingiliano za matokeo ya utabiri zinatengenezwa kwa kutumia "Plotly" na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html`.
Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha taswira ya usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na matokeo ya utabiri inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama ripoti ya PDF kama `results/report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual LSTM implementation. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" with placeholder code. The `build_model()` function returns a string `"model placeholder"` rather than an actual LSTM model. There is no import of any deep learning framework (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras), no LSTM layer definition, no model architecture, and no training logic. The file merely lists LSTM as a keyword string (`KEYWORDS = ["LSTM", "lstm"]`) without implementing any real LSTM functionality.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation for loading Yahoo Finance data. Instead, it only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, with no use of libraries like `yfinance`, `pandas_datareader`, or any HTTP requests to Yahoo Finance. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it is not a real implementation. No actual data loading from Yahoo Finance occurs anywhere in the code.

judge_stats.criteria: Usafishaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation of data cleaning, handling missing values, or outlier detection. The file only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a static dictionary, and a `build_transforms()` function that returns a hardcoded list. The `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list merely *mentions* data cleaning as a string requirement but does not implement it. There is no code using pandas `dropna()`, `fillna()`, interpolation, z-score/IQR outlier removal, or any other actual data cleaning logic.

judge_stats.criteria: Dirisha la muda linatumika kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza kwa usimamizi. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation of a time window (sliding window) to convert time series data into a supervised learning problem. Instead, it only contains placeholder code with a list of requirement criteria as strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`), a `load_dataset()` function that returns a dummy dictionary, and a `build_transforms()` function that returns a static list. There is no real windowing logic (e.g., creating sequences of past observations as features and future values as targets) implemented anywhere in the file.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/predictions.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual stock price predictions. This indicates that real prediction results were never generated or saved to the file. The requirement calls for actual prediction outputs to be stored in this file, which has not been fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Chati za mwingiliano za matokeo ya utabiri zinatengenezwa kwa kutumia "Plotly" na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html` exists in the workspace, but its content is `('', None)` — meaning it is empty/invalid and does not contain any actual Plotly interactive chart. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no Plotly code was executed and no proper file-writing operation to `results/figures/` was recorded. Therefore, the requirement to generate and save an interactive prediction chart using Plotly has not been fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha taswira ya usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na matokeo ya utabiri inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama ripoti ya PDF kama `results/report.pdf`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The file `results/report.pdf` exists in the workspace, but its content shows `('Error reading PDF file: Cannot read an empty file', None)`, meaning the PDF file is empty and contains no actual content. Additionally, the trajectory evidence confirms that no steps were recorded for creating a Jupyter Notebook with model architecture visualizations, training process, or prediction results, nor for converting such a notebook to PDF. Therefore, the requirement to create and save a proper PDF report has not been fulfilled.
